name: Terminus Coin
description: Terminus Coin is a proof-of-work SPL token on Solana. Miners burn keccak256 hashes to claim emissions; the network self-regulates via continuous-target difficulty adjustment. Hard cap of 1,000,000,000 TERM over a 50-year emissions schedule with halving every 5 years. Dynamic burn (0.25%–5%) scales with network heat. Anti-Sybil bond required to mine. Per-wallet two-step authority transfer; freeze authority can be permanently disabled.
